rationale: No new escalation near Romania's borders; El Niño confirmation adds marginal climate risk; Xi-Kim summit slightly elevates broader NATO-flank tension but no direct impact on Romanian daily life.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Deepening China-North Korea alignment adds background pressure to NATO's strategic posture, indirectly relevant to Romania as a NATO member on the eastern flank.

top_events.title: El Niño under way, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Active El Niño raises risk of agricultural disruption and extreme weather in southeastern Europe, including Romania.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17
top_events.summary: Ongoing Middle East conflict with no direct Black Sea or Romanian impact, but continued instability could affect migration flows and energy markets.
